headline: PNC Financial Q2 Earnings Top on NII & Fee Income Growth, Stock Down
summary: PNC's Q2 2026 results gain from higher NII, fee income and loan growth. However, shares fall nearly 3.8% as expenses rise and deposits decline.

headline: What To Do After Wells Fargo Stock Slumped After Strong Second Quarter Report
summary: Wells Fargo & Company delivered strong Q2 results, with EPS of $2.00 and revenue up 8.6% Y/Y to $22.62 billion. Read more on WFC stock here.
